meta.name: Mullusi
meta.purpose: Structured public website content for Mullusi.

proofLanes.label: Identity
proofLanes.title: Immutable public boundary
proofLanes.summary: Mullusi is presented as one governed system across website, docs, repositories, sandbox, metrics, and public contact paths.

proofLanes.label: Governance
proofLanes.title: Claims tied to evidence
proofLanes.summary: Public claims are separated into products, research surfaces, planned domains, and operational interfaces.

proofLanes.label: Structure
proofLanes.title: Content is data-backed
proofLanes.summary: Repository cards, domain engines, interface links, proof lanes, and roadmap stages are modeled as structured records.

proofLanes.label: Evolution
proofLanes.title: Expansion without redesign
proofLanes.summary: New repositories and domains can enter the public site through data updates before they need dedicated pages.

interfaces.name: Docs
interfaces.summary: Reference material, architecture notes, and public learning paths.

interfaces.name: Sandbox
interfaces.summary: Experimental surface for governed demonstrations and prototypes.

interfaces.name: API
interfaces.summary: Public gateway reserved for service contracts and machine-facing endpoints.

interfaces.name: Metrics
interfaces.summary: Evidence plane reserved for runtime metrics, audits, graphs, and release witnesses.

releaseStages.title: Register
releaseStages.summary: Add or revise a public product record in the structured registry.

releaseStages.title: Attach
releaseStages.summary: Connect repository, docs, demo, proof, status, and contact routes.

releaseStages.title: Verify
releaseStages.summary: Confirm claims, accessibility, local rendering, and public boundary constraints.

releaseStages.title: Publish
releaseStages.summary: Expose the product surface without changing the website architecture.
